metadata.description: Renera AI tools and plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: immigration-guide
plugins.description: DIY U.S. immigration guidance for self-petitioners — covers visas, green cards, asylum, naturalization, work permits, and more

plugins.name: sound-studio
plugins.description: Complete music production toolkit using Python audio processing — mixing, mastering, stem separation, voice synthesis, composition, and genre blueprints. No DAW required.

plugins.name: codex-claude
plugins.description: Use Codex (GPT-5.x) as an architect and reviewer inside the Claude Code dev loop — drives a headless codex app-server over JSON-RPC for a native architect → implement → review loop. Codex plans and reviews; Claude implements. /codex-issue runs a fully autonomous loop that wraps the repo's OWN internal workflow (architect → approve → implement via the repo's full workflow → review-until-clean → push + PR); for repos whose lifecycle is a Claude Code Workflow it COMPOSES with that workflow (workflow-mode); /codex-compose-setup makes any repo composition-ready (adds the noLand seam or scaffolds a starter workflow).
